'''âp-sh-h-d''' ('''kapashhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantitate|quantitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantitate|quantitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-sh-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapashhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipashhedoko || jipashhedoko || shipashhedoko || kipashhedoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupashhedoko || jujupashhedoko || shushupashhedoko || kukupashhedoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupashhedoko || jupashhedoko || shupashhedoko || kupashhedoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupashhedoko || jupashhedoko || shupashhedoko || kupashhedoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepashhedoko || jepashhedoko || shepashhedoko || kepashhedoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopashhedoko || jojopashhedoko || shoshopashhedoko || kokopashhedoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopashhedoko || jopashhedoko || shopashhedoko || kopashhedoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopashhedoko || jopashhedoko || shopashhedoko || kopashhedoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko || pashhedoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠpashhedoko || jĂŠpashhedoko || shĂŠpashhedoko || kĂŠpashhedoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapashhedoko || jajapashhedoko || shashapashhedoko || kakapashhedoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapashhedoko || japashhedoko || shapashhedoko || kapashhedoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapashhedoko || japashhedoko || shapashhedoko || kapashhedoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shapashhedithi || shapashhediji || shapashhedishi || shapashhediki
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shapashhedathaf || shapashhedajaf || shapashhedashaf || shapashhedakaf
